name: Cranberry Cocktail Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first 9 ingredients in a large bowl; stir well.
2. Shape the meat mixture into 1-inch balls.
3. Place the meatballs in an ungreased 15x10x1 jellyroll pan.
4. Bake uncovered at 500°F for 8 - 10 minutes.
5. Remove the meatballs and transfer them to a chafing dish; keep warm.
6. Combine the cranberry sauce with the remaining ingredients in a saucepan.
7. Cook over medium heat until bubbly, stirring occasionally; pour over the meatballs.
8. Serve warm.
Yield: 5 dozen
